evaluators.name: Save top 2 recent sci-fi book reviews to Favorites evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user added the 2 highest-rated science fiction book reviews from the last 6 months to the Favorites reading list.

evaluators.name: Comment on lower-rated Inception review evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the preset comment was posted on the lower-rated of the Inception movie reviews and not on a different review.

evaluators.name: Create Summer 2026 list and add 3 mystery books evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user created the correct account, created a 'Summer 2026' custom list, and added the top 3 qualifying high-rated mystery book reviews to it.

evaluators.name: Add 2 oldest mid-rated thriller movies to watchlist evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user added the 2 oldest qualifying thriller movie reviews (runtime > 120 minutes, rating between 3 and 4 stars) to the Watchlist.

evaluators.name: Like LoTR book & movie review and follow movie author evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user liked the first Lord of the Rings book review and first movie review by tag, and followed the movie review's author.

evaluators.name: Subscribe to newsletter with custom weekly/monthly & rating filter evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user created a newsletter subscription with the given email/name, set custom per-category frequencies (weekly books, monthly movies), and enabled a 4+ star filter.

evaluators.name: Send disagreement message about lowest-rated comedy movie evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user sent a contact form message using the required template and the exact title of the lowest-rated qualifying comedy movie review.

evaluators.name: Mark 5 newest posts as read or saved-for-later pattern evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether, among the 5 newest reviews, the 1st/3rd/5th are marked as read and the 2nd/4th are saved for later in the Save for Later list.
